title: I built 300+ free browser-based tools — here's everything it can do
content:
I've been building CloudAIPDF for months. What started as a simple 
PDF tool slowly grew into a full toolkit. Here's everything it covers:

## 🎵 Audio Tools
Compress, trim, merge, convert, normalize, pitch-shift, and more.

- [Audio Compressor](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/audio-tools/audio-compressor)
- [Audio Format Converter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/audio-tools/audio-format-converter)
- [Noise Reducer](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/audio-tools/noise-reducer)
- [Audio Trimmer](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/audio-tools/audio-trim-advanced)
- [BPM Detector](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/audio-tools/bpm-detector)
- [Voice Isolation](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/audio-tools/audio-voice-isolation)

## 🎬 Video Tools
- [Video Compressor](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/video-tools/video-compressor)
- [Video Trimmer](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/video-tools/video-trimmer)
- [Video Format Converter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/video-tools/video-format-converter)
- [Video to GIF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/video-tools/video-to-gif)
- [Extract Audio](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/video-tools/extract-audio)
- [Video Stabilizer](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/video-tools/video-stabilizer)

## 📄 PDF Tools
- [PDF Merge](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/pdf-merge)
- [PDF Split](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/pdf-split)
- [PDF Compress](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/pdf-compress)
- [PDF OCR](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/pdf-ocr)
- [Edit PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/edit-pdf)
- [Sign PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/sign-pdf)
- [Protect PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/protect-pdf)
- [Unlock PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/unlock-pdf)
- [PDF Watermark](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/pdf-watermark)
- [Redact PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/pdf-tools/redact-pdf)

## 🖼️ Image Tools
- [Image Compressor](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/image-tools/image-compressor)
- [Image Resizer](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/image-tools/image-resizer)
- [Background Remover](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/image-tools/background-remover)
- [AI Image Upscaler](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/image-tools/ai-image-upscaler)
- [Image Format Converter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/image-tools/image-format-converter)
- [Image Enhancer](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/image-tools/image-enhancer)

## 🔄 File Converters (300+)
Popular ones:
- [JPG to PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/jpg-to-pdf)
- [PDF to Word](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/pdf-to-word)
- [WAV to MP3](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/wav-to-mp3)
- [MP4 to MP3](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/video-to-mp3)
- [PNG to WebP](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/png-to-webp)
- [Word to PDF](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/word-to-pdf)
- [HEIC to JPG](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/heic-to-jpg)
- [MKV to MP4](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/mkv-to-mp4)
- [RAR to ZIP](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/converter-tools/rar-to-zip)
- [CSV to JSON](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/data-tools/csv-to-json)

## 🔢 Calculators (50+)
Finance, health, physics, chemistry, and fun ones too:
- [EMI Calculator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/emi)
- [BMI Calculator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/bmi)
- [Compound Interest](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/compound-interest)
- [Loan Calculator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/loan)
- [Calorie Calculator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/calorie)
- [GPA Calculator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/gpa)
- [Carbon Footprint](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/calculators/carbon-footprint)

## 🛠️ Developer Tools
- [JSON Formatter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/developer-tools/json-formatter)
- [Base64 Converter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/developer-tools/base64-converter)
- [Hash Generator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/developer-tools/hash-generator)
- [SQL Formatter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/developer-tools/sql-formatter)
- [Code Formatter](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/developer-tools/code-formatter)

## 🌐 Network Tools
- [DNS Lookup](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/network-tools/dns-lookup)
- [SSL Checker](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/network-tools/ssl-checker)
- [WHOIS Lookup](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/network-tools/whois-lookup)
- [Subnet Calculator](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/network-tools/subnet-calculator)

---

Everything is **free, no login required, no watermarks**.
Runs entirely in the browser.

👉 [See all 300+ tools here](https://www.cloudaipdf.com/all-tools)

Built with React + TypeScript. Would love feedback from the dev 
community — what tools are missing? What should I build next?
